markets.no_sub_title: At least 9 million
markets.rules_primary: If the #1 Movie on Netflix has at least 9 million views on the chart published on Mar 31, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
This market specifically encompasses the number of “Views” (not hours viewed) of
the top Movie ranked on Netflix’s weekly charts for Global "Movies  | English"  chart.

The Netflix charts are updated on Tuesday. Therefore, the market will close at 11:59 PM ET the day before. The chart published on Mar 31, 2026 will be for the week ending the previous Sunday.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.no_sub_title: Win
markets.rules_primary: If MrBeast says Win as part of Next MrBeast Youtube Video, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Video of the Next MrBeast Youtube Video will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, internal & external (official) transcripts of the Next MrBeast Youtube Video will be used.

Payout Criterion: 
The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. 
Plural nouns occurring within proper nouns and noun phrases (e.g. names, titles, etc) are included.
For the purposes of this market, “next MrBeast Youtube Video” refers to the first full-length upload on MrBeast’s main YouTube channel (@MrBeast) after March 24th, 2026 at 8:00 PM. The video must be at least four minutes long to qualify. YouTube Shorts, teaser trailers, live streams, community posts, and uploads on other channels (e.g., Beast Philanthropy, MrBeast Gaming, Beast Reacts) are excluded. Please see full rules for more details.
For the purpose of this market, the entirety of content within the first full-length upload will be used for resolution.
Please see full rules for more details.
markets.title: What will MrBeast say during Next MrBeast Youtube Video?
markets.yes_sub_title: Win

markets.rules_primary: If MrBeast says Money as part of Next MrBeast Youtube Video, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Video of the Next MrBeast Youtube Video will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, internal & external (official) transcripts of the Next MrBeast Youtube Video will be used.

Payout Criterion: 
The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. 
Plural nouns occurring within proper nouns and noun phrases (e.g. names, titles, etc) are included.
For the purposes of this market, “next MrBeast Youtube Video” refers to the first full-length upload on MrBeast’s main YouTube channel (@MrBeast) after March 24th, 2026 at 8:00 PM. The video must be at least four minutes long to qualify. YouTube Shorts, teaser trailers, live streams, community posts, and uploads on other channels (e.g., Beast Philanthropy, MrBeast Gaming, Beast Reacts) are excluded. Please see full rules for more details.
For the purpose of this market, the entirety of content within the first full-length upload will be used for resolution.
Please see full rules for more details.

markets.no_sub_title: Yield Curve
markets.rules_primary: If the Chair of the Federal Reserve says Yield Curve at his Apr 2026 post-FOMC meeting introductory remarks and Q+A, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Video of the Apr 2026 post-FOMC meeting introductory remarks and Q+A will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, internal & external (official) transcripts of the Apr 2026 post-FOMC meeting introductory remarks and Q+A will be used. The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. Please see full rules for more details.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the law is enacted
markets.no_sub_title: Yes
markets.rules_primary: If legislation that decouples New York tax law from the federal Qualified Small Business Stock (QSBS) gain exclusion under IRC §1202 has become law in New York before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Enactment requires completion of all constitutional and legal requirements for the legislation to become binding law. For standard legislation requiring executive approval, this includes final passage by all required legislative bodies, executive signature OR becoming law despite executive inaction OR successful veto override, and satisfaction of any required waiting periods. For legislation not requiring executive approval, this includes final passage and completion of required waiting periods. For constitutional amendments, this includes passage with required supermajorities and completion of ratification processes. For executive orders, this includes official signature, publication in official government records, and legal effectiveness. Legislative passage without completed executive action, passage by only some required bodies, provisional passage, non-binding resolutions, and draft orders do not constitute enactment. Enactment occurs when all requirements are completed, regardless of pending judicial challenges.
markets.title: Will legislation that decouples New York tax law from the federal Qualified Small Business Stock (QSBS) gain exclusion under IRC §1202 become law in New York before Jan 1, 2027?
markets.yes_sub_title: Yes
